excludes.title: Exclude Patterns
excludes.description: File and directory patterns to exclude from the list

relativeSearch.title: Relative Search
relativeSearch.description: Whether to search from currently selected directory

indexingMethod.title: Indexing Method
indexingMethod.description: Method to use for file indexing: 'server' uses the backend endpoint, 'frontend' uses the JupyterLab Contents API

respectGitignore.title: Respect .gitignore
respectGitignore.description: Skip files and directories matched by .gitignore patterns. In 'frontend' indexing mode this requires the Jupyter Server to allow listing hidden files (ContentsManager.allow_hidden=True), since .gitignore files are themselves hidden.
